requirement_topic.en: China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 Compared with Nigeria Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023与尼日利亚要求对比
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023與奈及利亞要求對比

summary.en: Nigeria-side acceptance of a China BESS file depends on the specific import and project route: SONCAP for regulated imported goods, SON or project acceptance of NIS / IEC / approved-equivalent standards, dangerous-goods transport evidence, NERC or state-regulator project requirements, and local fire or electrical safety review. China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 should be treated as technical evidence to be mapped, not as automatic Nigerian approval.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚侧是否接受中国BESS文件，取决于具体进口和项目路径：受管进口货物的SONCAP、SON或项目方对NIS / IEC / 认可等效标准的接受、危险货物运输证据、NERC或州监管机构项目要求，以及当地消防或电气安全审查。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023应作为需要映射的技术证据，而非自动获得尼日利亚批准。
summary.zht: 奈及利亞側是否接受中國BESS文件，取決於具體進口和項目路徑：受管進口貨物的SONCAP、SON或項目方對NIS / IEC / 認可等效標準的接受、危險貨物運輸證據、NERC或州監管機構項目要求，以及當地消防或電氣安全審查。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023應作為需要映射的技術證據，而非自動獲得奈及利亞批准。

standards_or_laws: NIS / IEC / approved equivalent standards where accepted
NERC, fire-safety, electrical-safety, and transport requirements where applicable

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 is a China national standard for lithium batteries and battery packs used in electrical energy storage systems, and GB/T 36276-2023 is a recommended China national standard for lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage. These are central China-side references for BESS safety and performance dossiers, but they do not create SONCAP, NERC, customs, transport, or local installation approval in Nigeria.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024是中国电能存储系统用锂蓄电池和电池组国家标准，GB/T 36276-2023是中国电力储能用锂离子电池推荐性国家标准。它们是中国侧BESS安全和性能资料的核心依据，但不会在尼日利亚自动形成SONCAP、NERC、海关、运输或本地安装批准。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024是中國電能存儲系統用鋰蓄電池和電池組國家標準，GB/T 36276-2023是中國電力儲能用鋰離子電池推薦性國家標準。它們是中國側BESS安全和性能資料的核心依據，但不會在奈及利亞自動形成SONCAP、NERC、海關、運輸或本地安裝批准。

gap.en: Build a clause-by-clause crosswalk from GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 to the Nigerian request list. Typical additional evidence includes SONCAP route documents, IEC 62619 or IEC 62933 reports where requested, UN 38.3 test summary, English manuals and warning labels, site commissioning records, and authority-specific approval letters.
gap.zh: 应建立从GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023到尼日利亚要求清单的逐条款对照。常见额外证据包括SONCAP路径文件、适用时的IEC 62619或IEC 62933报告、UN 38.3测试概要、英文手册和警示标签、场址调试记录及主管机关特定批准函。
gap.zht: 應建立從GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023到奈及利亞要求清單的逐條款對照。常見額外證據包括SONCAP路徑文件、適用時的IEC 62619或IEC 62933報告、UN 38.3測試概要、英文手冊和警示標籤、場址調試記錄及主管機關特定批准函。

mandatory_status.target: China GB evidence is not automatically mandatory or sufficient in Nigeria; Nigerian obligations are mandatory only where SONCAP, SON, NERC, state regulator, customs, transport, fire, insurer, utility, or contract requirements apply
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where applicable in China; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly referenced

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation / National Public Service Platform for Standards Information (China)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB documentation is a useful technical baseline for Nigeria BESS projects, but it must be mapped to SONCAP, IEC / NIS, UN 38.3, NERC, fire-safety, and site-approval evidence before relying on it for Nigerian market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB文件是尼日利亚BESS项目有用的技术基线，但在用于尼日利亚市场准入前，必须映射至SONCAP、IEC / NIS、UN 38.3、NERC、消防安全和场址批准证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB文件是奈及利亞BESS項目有用的技術基線，但在用於奈及利亞市場准入前，必須映射至SONCAP、IEC / NIS、UN 38.3、NERC、消防安全和場址批准證據。
